message: 2 trading days exceeded the 2-sigma break rate threshold of 21.2%. Average break rate is 17.2%. Investigate batch processing or data feed issues on these dates.
1,728 breaks exceed $1M in notional value, totaling $4,295,741,750. These require immediate senior management attention.
7,003 breaks are aging beyond 30 days with $4,763,557,041 in notional exposure. These approach regulatory reporting thresholds and require escalation.
5,465 failed settlements detected. Volume exceeds normal operational threshold. Check custodian connectivity and instruction delivery pipeline.
